shared_properties: Primary painted tone remains #535353 with transparent cutouts only.
Outline weight stays at 2 px for the body shell and tail edge.
differences: Head pitches forward by 6 px and the jaw line drops to signal impact.
Eye cutout becomes a closed 6x6 px mark to read defeat state immediately.
Both legs freeze in an asymmetric stop pose with no loop animation.

reference_images.label: offline_sprite_1x
reference_images.purpose: 1x pixel atlas for dinosaur, cactus, pterodactyl, digits, and ground proportions.

reference_images.label: gameplay_capture
reference_images.purpose: Gameplay frame for HUD anchoring, sky-ground composition, and runner lane spacing.

reference_images.label: run_loop_capture
reference_images.purpose: Run cadence, jump silhouette timing, and restart screen pacing.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load one 88x94 PNG during Loading state and swap the sprite handle on collision confirmation.
runtime_notes: Freeze animation timers before this sprite becomes visible.
Keep the transform anchor at x=80 and y=56 so the death pose aligns with the ground line.
Disable input-driven sprite swaps while the dead state is active.

context.usage: Displayed from obstacle collision until the restart flow begins.

silhouette_notes: Head tip moves 6 px forward relative to the run core muzzle tip.
Tail droops by 4 px to reduce motion energy.
Accent color #FF0000 is reserved for one 2x2 px impact mark only.

acceptance_criteria: Canvas is exactly 88x94 px with transparent background beyond the silhouette.
Eye mark reads as closed state at 1x scale without anti-aliased pixels.
Any #FF0000 pixel stays inside a single 2x2 px impact accent zone.
